name: 20"x8" Solid Cylinder Outdoor Bolster Pillow with Contrast Piping Tan - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Add stylish stripes to your patio furniture with this Cylinder Outdoor Bolster Pillow with Contrast Piping from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Boasting fade-resistant properties, this bolster pillow is adorned with contrast stripes to make sure your outdoor space is as beautiful as your living room. The decorative cylindrical pillow features cushioned filling and a soft fabric cover to provide you with plenty of comfort when relaxing in your fave chair or couch in the garden or on the deck.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
